title: spiraea × pachystachys
intro: Spiraea × pachystachys, also known as Spirea, is a hybrid flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Spiraea × pachystachys include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and improve gut health. In herbal preparations, Spiraea × pachystachys is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be applied topically as a poultice or ointment to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
